title: Thyella pycnocephala
taxonomy: Thyella pycnocephala is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk in the family Pyramidellidae. It belongs to the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and the order Pyramidellida. Within the family Pyramidellidae, Thyella pycnocephala is part of the subfamily Thyellobinae. This classification helps to identify and categorize the species within the broader hierarchy of mollusks. The precise classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Thyella pycnocephala.
